title: NewsArticle
description: Defines a news article returned by the Bing News Search API.

name.description: The name of the article. Use this along with url to create a hyperlink.

url.description: A URL to the news article.

description.description: A short description of the news article.

datePublished.description: The date and time that Bing discovered the article in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format.

category.description: The news category that the article belongs to. For example, Sports.

headline.description: If true, the article is a headline. Included only for news category requests without a specific category specified.

id.description: An ID that uniquely identifies this article in the list of articles.

image.description: An image related to the news article. Contains only the thumbnail field in this context.

thumbnail.description: A link to a thumbnail of the image.

contentUrl.description: The URL to the thumbnail image.

height.description: The height of the thumbnail in pixels.

width.description: The width of the thumbnail in pixels.

provider.description: A list of providers that ran the article.

name.description: The name of the news provider.

mentions.description: A list of entities (places or persons) mentioned in the article.

name.description: The name of the entity mentioned in the article.

clusteredArticles.description: A list of related news articles.

video.description: A video that's related to the news article.

thumbnailUrl.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the video.

embedHtml.description: An iFrame that lets you embed and run the video in your webpage.

motionThumbnailUrl.description: A URL to an animated thumbnail that shows a preview of the video.

allowHttpsEmbed.description: Whether you may embed the video on HTTPS pages.

thumbnail.description: The width and height of the thumbnail image.

contractualRules.description: A list of rules that you must adhere to if you display the article. Only articles returned by Web Search API include contractual rules.
